detail: Django + HTMX + Tailwind + Alpine.js is the dominant validated stack across Tour2Tech projects
Peak productivity at 19:00 UTC (00:30 IST). 36 sessions at that hour.
Multi-model architecture: Opus for thinking, GPT-5.4 for Haiku tasks, Gemini Pro as option
Internal-Tracker exists at 3 paths with 149 combined sessions. Context is fragmented.
40% todo completion rate across 304 tracked items. Front-loaded: Phase 1 completes, Phase 2-3 rarely.
Testing is nearly always the last todo item and almost never completed.
